'''sabuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cdna|cdna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cdna|cdna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sabuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæbijith|sæbijith]] || [[word:sæbijij|sæbijij]] || [[word:sæbijish|sæbijish]] || [[word:sæbiji|sæbiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabubujuth|sabubujuth]] || [[word:sabubujuj|sabubujuj]] || [[word:sabubujush|sabubujush]] || [[word:sabubuju|sabubuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabujuth|sabujuth]] || [[word:sabujuj|sabujuj]] || [[word:sabujush|sabujush]] || [[word:sabuju|sabuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabufjuth|sabufjuth]] || [[word:sabufjuj|sabufjuj]] || [[word:sabufjush|sabufjush]] || [[word:sabufjuf|sabufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sabujuthu|sabujuthu]] || [[word:sabujuju|sabujuju]] || [[word:sabujushu|sabujushu]] || [[word:sabujuku|sabujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sabujuth|sabujuth]] || [[word:sabujuj|sabujuj]] || [[word:sabujush|sabujush]] || [[word:sabuju|sabuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sabujuthul|sabujuthul]] || [[word:sabujujul|sabujujul]] || [[word:sabujushul|sabujushul]] || [[word:sabujukul|sabujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sabujuthuthu|sabujuthuthu]] || [[word:sabujujuju|sabujujuju]] || [[word:sabujushushu|sabujushushu]] || [[word:sabujuku|sabujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sabujuthun|sabujuthun]] || [[word:sabujujun|sabujujun]] || [[word:sabujushun|sabujushun]] || [[word:sabujukun|sabujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sabujuthuoro|sabujuthuoro]] || [[word:sabujujuoro|sabujujuoro]] || [[word:sabujushuoro|sabujushuoro]] || [[word:sabujukuoro|sabujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
